# SHIPPED: AgentSpec v3.2.0 Upstream Sync

> Feature shipped on 2026-05-07

## Metadata

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Feature** | AGENTSPEC_V320_SYNC |
| **Ship Date** | 2026-05-07 |
| **Author** | ship-agent |

---

## Summary

Ported all upstream `luanmorenommaciel/agentspec` v3.2.0 changes to the Copilot CLI fork (`Arthur1511/agentspec-copilot`). The release adds the **Judge Layer V0** — a cross-model second-opinion reviewer via OpenRouter — plus a **workspace initializer** hook, **agent override scaffolding**, contributor tooling (Makefile), build pipeline improvements (Step 0 agent-router generation), and comprehensive documentation. All 13 items were adapted from Claude Code conventions (`.claude/`, `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}`, slash commands) to Copilot CLI conventions (`.github/`, `${COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT}`, skills). Skill count moved from 35 → 36, manifest and all plugin JSON bumped to `3.2.0`.

## What Was Built

### Components

| Component | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `scripts/judge.py` | Judge Layer V0 — cross-model second opinion via OpenRouter; 4 phase-tuned prompts; JSONL ledger with daily budget cap |
| `scripts/init-workspace.sh` | Session-start workspace initializer; creates SDD dirs, detects stack, scaffolds agent override dir |
| `.github/skills/review-judge/SKILL.md` | 36th skill — user-invokable wrapper for judge.py with phase args and exit code docs |
| `Makefile` | Contributor tooling: `build`, `check`, `generate`, `lint`, `clean`, `install-deps` |
| `.shellcheckrc` | Repo-wide ShellCheck config disabling SC1091 + SC2155 |
| `docs/concepts/agent-overrides.md` | Guide for flat-structure agent overrides and custom agents |
| `docs/getting-started/judge-setup.md` | Full setup guide for review-judge skill |

### Files Modified

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `build-copilot.sh` | Step 0: agent router generation before clean |
| `build-copilot.ps1` | Step 0: `uv run python scripts/generate-agent-router.py` |
| `.github/hooks/hooks.json` | Calls `init-workspace.sh` instead of inline mkdir |
| `.github/sdd/architecture/WORKFLOW_CONTRACTS.yaml` | Version 3.2.0 + `agent_resolution` section |
| `.github/manifest.yaml` | Version 3.2.0, skills: 36 |
| `plugin-copilot/plugin.json` | Version 3.2.0, 36 skills |
| `plugin-copilot/.claude-plugin/plugin.json` | Version 3.2.0, 36 skills |
| `plugin-copilot/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` | Version 3.2.0, 36 skills |
| `CHANGELOG.md` | `[3.2.0]` section with all 13 changes |
| All 36 `SKILL.md` front matter | `name:` field stripped of category prefix |

---

## Lessons Learned

### Process

- The SDD workflow (Brainstorm → Define → Design → Build → Ship) worked well across two sessions with checkpoint continuity — context was fully preserved and build proceeded without rework.
- Splitting Group A (independent) from Group B/C/D (dependent) items made parallel implementation safe and fast.

### Technical

- Windows CRLF line endings caused `(?m)^name:` regex to skip matches in PowerShell's `-replace` operator; switching to line-by-line processing resolved it immediately.
- `plugin-copilot/` and `.claude-plugin/` JSON files are not rebuilt by `build-copilot.sh` — they need manual version bumps in addition to `manifest.yaml`.
- `uv run python` is the preferred Python invocation in `build-copilot.ps1` for environments using uv as the package manager.

### Communication

- The user's decision to strip category prefixes from skill `name:` fields (while keeping directory names) was a late-session clarification — worth capturing in copilot-instructions.md or a convention doc to avoid future confusion.

### Tools & Libraries

- Pure Python stdlib for `judge.py` (no deps) keeps it zero-install — correct choice for a build-time utility that contributors may run before installing project dependencies.
- `uv run python` sidesteps Windows PATH issues with Python entirely.

---

## Recommendations for Future Work

| Area | Recommendation |
|------|----------------|
| Judge testing | Add `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` to CI secrets and a smoke test that calls `judge.py --ledger` (exit 0, no API call needed) |
| `.gitignore` | Add `.github/storage/judge-ledger.jsonl` — it is local-only and should not be committed |
| Skill name convention | Document in `copilot-instructions.md` that skill `name:` field must be prefix-free (bare name only) |
| Plugin JSON sync | Consider adding `plugin-copilot/.claude-plugin/plugin.json` and `marketplace.json` to the build script so version bumps happen in one place |
